name: Pannekoeken (Dutch Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour with a small hole in the center.
2. Pour some milk into the hole and stir to combine.
3. Gradually add all the milk while stirring continuously to create a smooth batter.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, then mix in the salt, sugar, and oil until the batter is well combined and free of lumps.
5. Heat a large frying pan or crepe pan over high heat, adding butter if desired.
6. Pour about 2-3 tablespoons of batter into the hot pan to form a pancake.
7. Cook until the top surface is dry, then flip and cook the reverse side for approximately the same amount of time.
8. Fill with your choice of toppings such as savory pizzatype fillings or classic options like bacon and syrup pancakes, apple pancakes, or using applesyrup (or sugar and cinnamon) on top.
Savoury pizzatype fillings can be added after baking.
